verses.text: Jehu' kum sagihna kumin Joash in uk ding kipan a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmli sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Zibiah hi a, Beersheba khuami ahi hi
Siampi Jehoiada in amah thuhilh ahih manin Joash in ama uk hun sung tawntung Topa' muhna-ah a man gamta hi
Ahi zongin mualtunga biaknate kilakhia lo hi. Mite in tuate tungah biakna pia-in paknamtui hal lai uh hi
Joash in siampite kiangah, “Pasian' biakinn sungah a kipaipih a siangtho nate' man sum khempeuh, a milipin piak dingin a kiseh sum, leh amau' utthu tawh Pasian' biakinn-ah a kipaipih sumte
nomau' nasepna mite ciat panin no siampite in khawm un. Tua ciangin biakinn puahphatna ding a kisapna a kimuhna khempeuh puahsak un,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Kumpi Joash' uk kum sawmnihlethumna kum dongin siampite in biakinn puah kipan nailo uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Joash in siampi Jehoiada leh siampi dangte samin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin biakinn puahlo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na nasepna uh mite kiang panin na sumlakte uh kem nawn kei un la, a sumte biakinn puahna dingin ap un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin mite tung pan sum kaihkhop tavuan la nawnloin, biakinn puah ding zong tavuan a lak nawnlohna ding uh siampite a thukim uh hi

Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada in singkuang khat la-in a siin vutvang a, Topa' biakinn sung tum ciangin taklam pang khuam gei-ah a koih hi. Tua ciangin kongkhak a cing siampite in Topa' biakinn sungah a kipaipih sum khempeuh tua sungah a koih uh hi
Singkuang sungah sum tam om hi, ci-in a theih peuhpeuh uh ciangin kumpipa' lai-atpa leh siampi lianpenpa hong paito-in Topa' biakinn sungah a om sumte amaute in simin ip-in tun uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Topa' biakinn a en nasemte' khutsungah a tawi teh khiat uh sumte pia uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Topa' biakinn a sem khutsiamte leh innlamte tung
leh leilesuang innlam siamte leh suangseekte tungah Topa' biakinn puahna dingin sing leina ding leh suang tawhna ding, leh biakinn puahna khat peuhpeuh-a zat dingin piakhia uh hi
Ahih hangin Topa' biakinn-a dingin ngun kuangte, taitehte, haite, peengkulte, ahih kei leh kham ahi a, ngun nazat khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, Topa' biakinn-ah a kipaipih sumte panin kibawl lo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' biakinn a puah nasemte tungah tua sumte kipia hi
Amaute in thuman takin na sem uh ahih manin nasemte tungah piak dingin a khutsung uhah sum a apnate uh tung panin amaute in sazian ngenlo uh hi
Mawhna hanga piak sum leh khialhna hanga piak sumte Topa' biakinn sungah kipaipih lo hi; tuate pen siampite-a' ahi hi
Tua hun laitakin Syria kumpipa Hazael kuanto-in Gath simin a la hi. Ahih hangin Hazael in Jerusalem simin a paito dingin a mai a ngat ciangin

Judah kumpi Joash in Judah kumpite ahi ama hun ma-a sem Jehoshafat leh Jehoram leh Ahaziahte' apsa thuciam piakna letsongte khempeuh, leh ama thuciam piakna letsongte, leh Topa' biakinn leh kumpipa' sumkoihnate-ah a om kham khempeuh la-in Syria kumpipa Hazael kiangah a puak hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem panin Hazael a paikhia hi
Tu-in Joash' gamtatna a omlaite, leh a hih khempeuh, Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Ama nasemte kipanin sawmsimna khat vaihawm uh a, Silla paisukna lampi, Millo inn sungah Joash a that uh hi

Amah a satpukte pen ama nasemte, Shimeath' tapa Jozakar leh Shomer' tapa Jehozabad ahi hi; tua hi a, amah si ta hi. Tua ciangin amaute in David khuapi sungah a pate tawh amah vui uh a, ama tangin a tapa Amaziah in a uk hi.
